title: Little Malcolm and His Struggle Against the Eunuchs
original_title: Little Malcolm and His Struggle Against the Eunuchs
overview: An art student is thrown out of college. Depressed, he comes up with the Party of Dynamic Erection, a near fascist "party" that promotes male sexual dominance and which attracts a couple of other unsavoury confused characters.
